query:
ALTER TABLE parcels 
ADD COLUMN quality ENUM('economy', 'average', 'good', 'very_good', 'excellent') DEFAULT 'average',
ADD COLUMN condition ENUM('poor', 'fair', 'average', 'good', 'excellent') DEFAULT 'average',
ADD COLUMN lotSize INT,
ADD COLUMN propertySubtype VARCHAR(128),
ADD COLUMN renovationYear INT,
ADD COLUMN distanceToSchool FLOAT,
ADD COLUMN distanceToPark FLOAT,
ADD COLUMN distanceToTransit FLOAT,
ADD COLUMN distanceToDowntown FLOAT,
ADD COLUMN walkabilityScore INT,
ADD COLUMN neighborhoodClusterId INT;
